name: audit-deep
description: Platform-agnostic deep SEO and AEO audit. Runs evidence-based checks across 4 dimensions (Content, Technical, Authority, Measurement), reports each as a plain-language status, organizes findings into 3 action buckets (Technical/Content/Authority) and 3 priority tiers, and forecasts business impact per opportunity (incremental clicks/month and equivalent ad spend). Folds in client documents (crawl exports, paid-media or keyword strategy, analytics), pauses for more inputs, then assembles a structured nine-section report, then generates per-bucket working documents (tech fix checklist, topic-cluster overview, editorial content-brief sheet, backlink-opportunity and E-E-A-T lists). Adds keyword research, topic clusters, a backlink profile, and sibling-subdomain discovery. Works on any site. GSC, PageSpeed, a CMS MCP, and Keywords Everywhere are optional enrichments. No maturity score.
